message.content:
@startuml
participant "客户端" as Client
participant "认证中心" as AuthCenter
participant "网关" as Gateway
participant "缓存" as Cache
participant "业务服务" as BusinessService

Client ..> AuthCenter : 1 认证请求
AuthCenter ..> Client : 2 JWT
Client ..> Gateway : 3 服务请求 (带JWT)
Gateway ..> AuthCenter : 4 请求公钥
AuthCenter ..> Gateway : 5 JWK
Gateway ..> Cache : 6 验证签名
Cache ..> Gateway : 7 请求用户权限
Cache ..> Gateway : 8 返回用户权限列表
Gateway ..> Cache : 9 鉴权
Gateway ..> BusinessService : 10 服务请求
BusinessService ..> Client : 11 服务响应

@enduml
